name: Mushroom Mozzarella Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 1 clove Garlic; minced OR 1 tsp Garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broiler.
2. Combine soup, garlic (or garlic powder), Italian seasoning, and parmesan in a bowl until well blended. Set aside.
3. Cut bread into 1-inch slices and place on a baking sheet.
4. Brush each slice of bread with olive oil.
5. Toast lightly under the broiler.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Spread one tablespoon of soup mixture evenly over each slice of toasted bread.
8. Sprinkle green onions and red peppers over the soup mixture.
9. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
